name: StableX Technologies, Inc.
summary: StableX Technologies, Inc. (formerly AYRO, Inc.) transitioned in July 2025 from designing and manufacturing compact electric vehicles to a digital asset treasury management model. The company acquires and holds crypto tokens—including FLUID, INJ, LINK, and AAVE—targeting infrastructure and enabling technologies for the stablecoin sector, aiming to acquire up to $100 million in crypto assets to generate yield through capital appreciation.

products.name: FLUID holdings
products.description: Token investment in Fluid Protocol, a stablecoin swap exchange.

products.name: INJ holdings
products.description: Token investment in Injective Protocol, a layer-one token with stablecoin issuance and DeFi exchange tools.

products.name: LINK holdings
products.description: Token investment in Chainlink, an oracle service for blockchains.

products.name: AAVE holdings
products.description: Token investment in Aave Protocol, a decentralized lending protocol.

products.name: Electric Vehicles (historical)
products.description: Previously designed and manufactured compact, sustainable electric vehicles before July 2025 transition.

partnerships.description: Referenced as a partnership criterion for token selection; tokens with Circle integrations are prioritized.
Referenced as a partnership criterion for token selection; tokens with Tether integrations are prioritized.
